matches.match_rationale: The core pain is that 2,000+ accounts all look the same on a spreadsheet. A structured classification model can segment accounts into priority tiers automatically each morning.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A daily-refreshed priority scoring layer that sits over the SIS/billing system and outputs a ranked work queue for collection staff.

matches.match_rationale: The real collection question is: which families will pay if contacted this week vs. which will go delinquent regardless? A propensity model lets collection staff focus effort on recoverable accounts.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A payment likelihood within 30 days score per account that drives a contact-now queue for high-propensity families and an escalation-now flag for low-propensity/high-balance accounts.

matches.match_rationale: Collection staff currently compose ad hoc SMS/call scripts without knowing each family context. LLM-generated, context-aware message drafts reduce friction and reputational damage from incorrect-balance contacts.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A message drafting tool embedded in the collection workflow that generates a family-specific SMS or call script pulling from the live account record.

matches.match_rationale: The workflow — check account balance, verify last contact date, check if a payment promise is due today, send reminder, log outcome — is a multi-step repeatable process currently done manually.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An autonomous daily collection workflow agent that handles routine low-balance reminders and payment-promise follow-ups, escalating edge cases to a human queue.
